description: Screpy has been a valuable asset for Telkom University, enabling them to achieve significant improvements in their SEO performance.
author: Puti K.
pros: The platform provides recommendations for optimizing on-page elements such as titles, meta descriptions, headings, and content.
cons: Optimize website content: The university optimized their website content, including landing pages, blog posts, and course descriptions, to target these keywords.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: We had an awesome experience with Screpy, we do advise others to buy and use this to get more customer satisfaction.
author: Sarkaft S.
pros: We can fuly automize SEO for our customers. Its like a 100 in 1 tool for SEO management which blew our minds away.
cons: Steep learning curve and lots of options still to explore, which are not always as clear. Also the report making tool is not as well build for cusomization and maybe a connection with zapier or other integration tools.

description: I prefer Screpy because it’s affordable, simple, smart, and gives you actionable insights all in one dashboard—especially ideal if you manage multiple sites or need lightweight yet powerful SEO tools.
author: Abdul Rashid B.
pros: All-in-One Dashboard Screpy offers a unified interface where you can monitor SEO, page speed, uptime, and performance without switching tools. Easy to manage multiple websites in one place.
cons: Limited Backlink Analysis Screpy lacks a comprehensive backlink database like Ahrefs or SEMrush. If backlink audits or link building are part of your SEO strategy, Screpy may fall short.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Great tool that provides all the information I need for my projects. Highly recommendable!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This tool provides valuable information to fix issues, improve SEO, and maintain websites effectively. It’s an essential resource for anyone looking to optimize their online presence and ensure smooth website performance.
cons: Credit limitations can be a significant obstacle for an agency. In such cases, purchasing an LTD (Long-Term Deal) license may be the most recommended option, as it offers greater flexibility and more predictable costs in the long run
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Best tool to analyse seo and make reports

description: Screpy is a fantastic tool for people who want to get ahead in the world of SEO. It’s easy to use, and it’s really helped me get on the right track with my marketing strategy. I love that it’s so easy to find what you need and that you can easily save your progress. I would recommend Screpy to anyone who wants a great SEO tool that’s easy to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Screpy has become my go-to software for SEO. The technical SEO suggestions and the on-page SEO data it provides helped me already rank my website for three keywords in the top of search results in just 2 weeks. Simply love it.
cons: The navigation menu feels off but that is not something I really care about. Other than that the product is awesome. If you can bring in features for off-page SEO as well, it would be perfect.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It helps me increase the sale of my products.
author: Mariusz O.
pros: What I liked the most about this software was the ease of configuration, good seo tools and reliable presentation of rankings for my website.
cons: A significant disadvantage is the lack of other language versions of the interface than English. This limits the use of the tool to people who know this language.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Streamlined SEO and Performance Monitoring Made Simple with Screpy
description: My overall experience with Screpy has been positive. It has made a noticeable difference in how I approach website optimization. Its intuitive interface, combined with actionable insights, has saved me time and simplified the complexities of SEO and website performance monitoring.
author: Manish K.
pros: he most impressive aspect of Screpy for me was its user-friendly dashboard that consolidates various SEO and website analytics tools into one cohesive platform. The ability to track page speed, SEO rankings, and uptime with such ease allowed me to optimize my website efficiently without having to juggle multiple tools.
cons: Despite its many benefits, Screpy’s keyword tracking sometimes felt limited in comparison to dedicated SEO tools, which offer more in-depth analysis and a broader range of keywords to track.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Razi R.
pros: I absolutely love the Screpy SEO tool! It is so user-friendly and easy to navigate. The comprehensive results allow me to quickly identify opportunities for my website and my clients. The tool is great for beginners and professionals alike. I highly recommend Screpy for anyone looking to improve their website's SEO.
cons: Keyword limit is not generous. I donot have any other cons right now
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: The best tool for web analysis
author: savio M.
pros: Great feature. Screpy has an excellent panel for monitoring keyword.
cons: I have nothing to complain about Screpy. She is an excellent tool
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Screpy good for beginner but needs improvement
description: Screpy has really helped with improving the SEO on my website and I can monitor keyword ranking with the platform, but more improvement is needed in explaining how to solve the issues on my site.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that Screpy gives me an overview of the health of my website and identifies possible issues with the website. It is able to check individual pages for errors, speed and do an SEO content analysis. It helped me solve SEO technical issues that I did not know existed.
cons: Unfortunately, there is a lack of information explaining how to solve the issues with my website from Screpy analysis. I had to search with Google on how to solve the problems.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Complete SEO tool at an affordable price.
author: Jorge H.
pros: The platform is very easy to use, intuitive, and quite robust. It allows you to see SEO optimization, site speed testing, and keyword ranking in one place at an affordable cost, making it a very accessible tool for independent professionals and internal teams of companies.
cons: The platform is very robust, but it still needs to mature a little more in terms of how it displays information and its speed. It also needs a roadmap to understand what they have in mind and their upcoming updates to understand what's coming in future versions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Save some serious cash and get the most out of your SEO game with AppSumo's lifetime deal!
author: Shreyash S.
pros: Purchasing the tool was an absolute no-brainer for me thanks to AppSumo's unbelievable lifetime deal. Even though I had plenty of experience with ahrefs/semrush, I still needed some time to get acclimated to the interface - luckily it only took a few hours and I quickly felt like a pro navigating through. Whether the lifetime deal was still available or not didn't matter to me, since the monthly pricing was more than fair considering all that's included in the package. After making my purchase, I'm totally sold; this tool has made SEO so much easier! Not only can users quickly find quality backlinks for their sites and keep an eye on competitors' activities, but it also provides invaluable advice on how to enhance your SEO as well as plan out organic or paid marketing strategies with competitive intelligence and keyword gap analysis.
cons: Navigating the platform can be tricky, but don't worry! I'm here to make it easier. With one-on-one classes, helpful YouTube videos, and support staff who are always on hand when you need them, we've discovered amazing solutions with the platform. And there's no limit to how much better we can make things - let's get to it!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Impressed by how effective and comprehensive the platform is vs other platforms I presently use
author: Tim C.
pros: The most advantageous feature is the ease of navigation and how clear the indicators are for what needs to be corrected and how.
cons: Given that I have to pick an aspect I like least about the software, I would say that the fact I have to do ANYTHING would be an area (ideally, I wouldn't have to do anything for this platform to be the best of the best). But given what I got for how 'little' I had to pay, I am quite pleased with the package overall.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Vlad M.
pros: An awesome SEO tool. Helped me find some issues with my website and fix them. A simple and intuitive interface and more than enough operations are included for small and medium websites (for the plan I have, Pro+).
cons: Could use a refresh button for the site health issues to see if the problems got fixed after you work on the site.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
